friendly_name: Configurable scan cadence and URL rescan intervals
purpose_context: Replaces the hard-coded once-per-ISO-week URL eligibility rule with configurable, elapsed-day rescan intervals and a per-domain scan cadence (incremental vs daily), driven by new config/targets.yml fields with safe defaults that preserve every existing target's current behavior.
purpose_tldr: Configurable scan cadence (daily vs incremental) and elapsed-day URL/priority-URL rescan intervals, replacing the fixed once-per-ISO-week rule.
